dependency_contract: packages/core -> no app, agents, or knowledge deps

entries.import_rewrite_policy: Keep frontend-local components/hooks/lib as relative imports inside the app; import shared payload types and any test-shared browser-safe helpers from @decomp-orchestrator/ui-contract.

Export UiConfig, FormState, Dashboard, RunDetails, JsonObject, and API payload types from @decomp-orchestrator/ui-contract; apps/dashboard and apps/dashboard-server must consume this package instead of duplicating contracts.
Move browser-safe formatting helpers that are asserted by tests into ui-contract so tests do not import app internals.
Update Vite outDir and dashboard-server static root to use the new ignored production build output.
Expose state APIs through @decomp-orchestrator/core/state or package root exports; apps and packages must not import moved files by relative sibling paths.

Move pure board parsing/candidate logic to core; remove current src/board/snapshot.ts knowledge imports by injecting graph rank data or moving knowledge-specific ranking adapters to packages/knowledge.
entries.boundary_risk: src/board/snapshot.ts currently imports src/knowledge/index.ts, which would violate packages/core -> no knowledge deps.

entries.import_rewrite_policy: Export command runners through @decomp-orchestrator/core/shell.
Export report-run helpers through @decomp-orchestrator/core/report.
Export regression report parsing and PR promotion helpers through @decomp-orchestrator/core/objdiff.
Export checkpoint and handoff helpers through @decomp-orchestrator/core/handoff; preserve existing worker-validation source edits in checkpoint.ts.
Export local environment loading through @decomp-orchestrator/core/env.
Expose shared runtime types from @decomp-orchestrator/core/types and package root type exports.
Import core state/board/types through @decomp-orchestrator/core. Do not import @decomp-orchestrator/agents; callers pass agent-context data into resource-map rendering.

Import core runtime/types through @decomp-orchestrator/core and knowledge resource/decomp-context APIs through @decomp-orchestrator/knowledge. Preserve dirty worker change-validation edits and templates.
Update manifest paths from src/agents/... to packages/agents/src/... while keeping root knowledge/... script paths repo-relative.
Root bun run orch delegates to the app entrypoint; the binary imports CLI main from apps/cli/src/cli/main.ts.
CLI command modules import packages by workspace package name. Long-running worker subprocess resolution must use the new app binary path.

Server imports workspace packages and invokes the CLI app entrypoint; static serving points to apps/dashboard/dist. The request handler is exported for non-listening validation, while direct script execution starts Bun.serve.
Use @decomp-orchestrator/core/objdiff for report parsing and expose only server-owned trusted report helpers.
Convert imports from ../src/... to workspace package/app exports. Keep tests as repo-level assets.
Root knowledge corpora, Python APIs, generated indexes, and graph state remain repo-level. TypeScript path helpers in packages/knowledge must continue to resolve this root.
Update implementation docs after paths settle; keep docs as repo-level assets.
Objective artifacts document the migration and are not runtime package inputs.
Keep fixture paths repo-level and use them from root compatibility commands.
Keep AI/reference docs repo-level.
Add Bun workspaces and keep root compatibility scripts delegating to old paths until each owner phase moves.
Convert to a root aggregator extending tsconfig.base.json while preserving broad root validation.
Keep targets delegating through root compatibility scripts; do not start UI server during validation unless user asks.
